'''Az-Iban''' was an eccentric [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who flew the ''[[Rampaging Ranat]]'', a [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]].<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref> The [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Kowakian monkey-lizard/Legends|Kowakian monkey-lizard]] [[Picaroon C. Boodle]] was Iban's pet and first mate, until [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] forces quarantined Pic, accusing him of carrying [[Cyborrean rabies]].<ref name="The Dark Forces Saga, Part 5">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050609a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 5: Two Peas in a Pod}}</ref>

Az-Iban was a secretive person, and concealed his routes from his competition. Unfortunately for him, this made it easy for [[Morturr Heth]], a [[Disac pirates|Disac pirate]] and four other survivors of that fleet to seize his vessel and take his identity and that of his crew. It was uncertain what happened to Az-Iban, but he was almost certainly killed.<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run" />

The false Az-Iban later participated in a race near [[Novolek Beacon/Legends|Novolek Beacon]] organized by [[Mal Biron]] which was intended to pick the most skilled [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] for employment by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]] [[Sprax]]. The second part of the race, near the [[Salin Corridor/Legends|Salin Corridor]], was a rendezvous with the ''[[Destination: Adventure!]]'', a luxury spaceliner. Heth and his crew then attacked the liner and the other competitors with the aid of other [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] positioned nearby.<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run" />

==Behind the scenes==
The similarity of this character's name to that of [[Mon Julpa]]'s alias Kez-Iban, which meant "He That Returns from Death" in [[Bocce/Legends|Bocce]], suggests the name may also be a Bocce phrase.
